name: firetv
title: Fire TV Control
description: Cast YouTube and Stremio to your Fire TV via Home Assistant
author: gtarraga

commands.name: cast-youtube
commands.title: Cast YouTube
commands.subtitle: Clipboard → Fire TV SmartTube
commands.description: Turn on your Fire TV and projector, then play a YouTube video in SmartTube

commands.name: cast-stremio
commands.title: Cast Stremio
commands.subtitle: Clipboard → Fire TV Stremio
commands.description: Turn on your Fire TV and projector, then open a movie or show in Stremio

preferences.name: haUrl
preferences.title: Home Assistant URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance

preferences.name: haToken
preferences.title: Home Assistant Token
preferences.description: Long-lived access token from HA → Security

preferences.name: entityId
preferences.title: Fire TV Entity
preferences.description: media_player entity for your Fire TV

preferences.name: hasProjector
preferences.title: Projector connected
preferences.description: Wake the projector via Wake-on-LAN before casting
preferences.label: Projector connected

preferences.name: projectorEntityId
preferences.title: Projector Entity
preferences.description: media_player entity for your projector (used to check on/off state)

preferences.name: projectorMac
preferences.title: Projector MAC Address
preferences.description: MAC address for Wake-on-LAN magic packet
